title: Dyschoriste oligosperma
intro: Dyschoriste oligosperma, commonly known as Small-seeded Dyschoriste, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and inflammation, due to its potential health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Dyschoriste oligosperma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
